ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot carefully manipulating an abacus.  The robot will use both arms, one to hold the abacus steady and the other to move the beads.  The movements will be slow and deliberate, reflecting the careful nature of using an abacus. Frame 1 shows both arms in a neutral position, ready to interact with the abacus. Frame 2 shows the left arm supporting the abacus, gently holding it in place. The right arm is poised to move a bead.  Frame 3 shows the right arm moving a bead, the left arm remains steady. Frame 4 shows the right arm returning to its neutral position, and the left arm continues to support the abacus. Frame 5 shows the robot returning to a neutral pose after completing a calculation.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready for calculation
left arm supports the abacus, right hand poised
right hand slides beads with precision
right hand rests, left arm holds steady
both arms return to a resting, completed state
